system.docHtml: Valtári is a tongue of the Pidgin (contact) family. Fluency measures the sophistication of expression in Valtári, from the halting phrases of a traveler to the nuanced and learned discourse of a native speaker. As with all specific languages, this skill inherits its mechanics from the general [[Language]] skill; see [[Valtari_Language|Valtári Language]] for the linguistic and cultural background of the tongue itself.
